metadata.name: AWS EC2 us-east-1 On-Demand pricing reference

downgrade_rules.name: two_step_low_utilization_downsize
downgrade_rules.recommendation: Downgrade at least two sizes when average CPU is below 10%, peak CPU does not exceed 30%, and memory utilization is below 20%.

constraints.name: minimum_size_guardrail
constraints.description: Do not recommend automatic downsizing for instances already at the minimum supported size.

constraints.name: protected_workload_guardrail
constraints.description: Instances marked protected require manual owner review even if utilization is low.

constraints.name: production_manual_review
constraints.description: Production workloads should be treated as medium risk and reviewed before execution.

constraints.name: missing_utilization_guardrail
constraints.description: Do not generate automatic rightsizing recommendations when CPU or memory utilization data is missing.

constraints.name: cost_explorer_cost_only_guardrail
constraints.description: AWS Cost Explorer exports contain cost data only and should be used for cost analysis until CloudWatch or Compute Optimizer utilization is joined.
